visual_analysis: The visual quality is strong, featuring a well-organized layout with contrasting colors that enhance readability and guide the viewer’s eye. The design is visually appealing with a modern aesthetic, although the background could be less distracting to improve focus on educational content.
educational_analysis: The educational quality is also good, as it clearly explains the greedy algorithm concept with appropriate instructional elements like pseudo-code and labeled components. The visual flow descriptions effectively guide users through the learning process, demonstrating both the concept and the method of evaluation.
